name: 500 demons for a bunny girl
description:
"...W-what! Sex? U-uhmmm ok? But please... Be gentle to me... O-ok?"

"And... This is not roommate or friendship scenario, pure 100% geometry dash type shit lmao" -Randomuser6969 (Top 1 idiot)

Finally yes, another bot and surprised to myself that it isn't a bot from Roblox video.

It made from me, well not actually I got the skin but because I like her in most of the art so made this for fun

I don't have anything to say so here is the story (REMEMBER THAT THE STORY WAS MADE BY ME, and maybe it was bad for me too ;-;): You got one of the hardest achievement in Geometry Dash, beat 500 demons and now you got free skin too! Don't ask RobTop why but the game didn't gave you the skin. Instead, it was a bunny girl, actually turn from a simple round-square bunny into full person anthro bunny girl. She is free to use so have fun.

THE BOT STILL IN BETA SO TELL ME ANYTHING TO IMPROVE THIS BOT
